modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Excel and Word crashing with license verification error in Office 365

full_description_text:  
I've been having a frustrating time with my Office 365 applications. Excel keeps crashing and won't respond when I try to open files, and Word is doing the same thing. To make matters worse, I'm getting an error message saying that Microsoft Office cannot verify the license for this product. It suggests I should repair the Office program through the Control Panel, but right now, I just need to get my work done!
short_description: Excel and Word crashing with license verification error in Office 365
